evidenceChecked: Clean HEAD and exact candidate commit e7d864d9640266ea43650e397aff5308f3a1795e.
lesson.json, assessment.json, references.json, claims.json, glossary.json, and ATTRIBUTION.md for PREM-WEL-001 version 0.4.2.
content/01-welcome.md through content/04-finish.md for semantic headings, source notes, alternatives, recovery, and learner-facing assessment disclosure.

site/lesson-reader.js and site/lesson-reader.css candidate delta for labelled fieldsets, keyboard checkboxes, polite atomic status, session-only Map state, reset behavior, dark theme, and guided overflow behavior.
site/premed/lessons/index.html, site/premed/lessons/read/index.html, site/premed/lessons/specimen/index.html, and tests/site.spec.js candidate delta for cache refresh and automated-path coverage.
Static checks run in the isolated review: JSON parsing, first-line H1 verification for all scenes, node --check site/lesson-reader.js, and git diff --check for the permitted delta.

Operator verification: npm ci; strict source preflight; and the focused Playwright production-reader regression covering keyboard criterion checks, polite status, reset, 390px reflow, and print continuity.

findings.finding: The three open-response items derive semantic manual self-check fieldsets from their rubrics: 4/4, 3/3, and 3/3. Each uses native checkboxes with labels, a polite atomic item status, and a polite atomic global 0/10-to-10/10 status. The in-memory criterion map preserves marks through scene/frame rerendering; Clear response resets only that item and recalculates the total, supporting recovery and retry without presenting the result as authoritative scoring.

The learner-facing and attribution disclosures state that open responses are manually marked and are not automatically scored or recorded; the UI additionally says it does not score, save, or submit marks. Unlimited untimed retakes, item-specific recovery routes, nonphysical alternatives, source attribution, CC BY 4.0 adaptation and modification notice, dated agent-access record, no third-party assets, and accountable author/agent provenance are present.

limitations: This is an accessibility-and-rights review only; it is not legal advice and does not establish rights in every jurisdiction.
The isolated reviewer inspected only the permitted candidate files and did not inspect prior reviews, adjudication, generated lesson data, author conversation, or external sources.

The isolated reviewer did not directly execute browser, screen-reader, touch-device, contrast-measurement, or print automation. The accountable operator separately ran the focused production-reader Playwright regression; no physical assistive-technology or touch-device session was performed.
